content: Just as Self-Refine enables large language models to iteratively polish raw outputs without external labeled data by leveraging intrinsic self-feedback, Reflexion can be extended to build a fully autonomous personal development agent for humans that turns unstructured daily experience into incremental self-improvement without external coaching or formal feedback. This combined framework treats human life experience the same way Self-Refine treats raw LLM outputs: a sequence of iterative self-critiques that build better long-term outcomes.
